claims.text: Psychology is a form of technology. All technological advancement fundamentally stems from understanding the properties of materials or phenomena—whether silicon, stainless steel, nitrogen, or other substances. As understanding of these properties improves, technology improves. By this logic, understanding the properties of human behavior and the human brain should not be excluded from the quest for technological advancement; they belong in the same category of property-based understanding that drives all other technological progress.
claims.speaker: Unknown
claims.mechanism: Understanding properties of a system enables technological advancement because it permits prediction, manipulation, and intentional design of outcomes; human behavior and neuroscience are systems with properties that can be understood and applied the same way as physical materials.
